expect: Formalize 3+ plant structures as lattice operations. Empirically test at least 1 against swarm data. Produce external-value artifact.
actual: Formalized 3 plant-lattice structures (phyllotaxis, developmental, mycorrhizal). Tested 2 empirically: F-PLB1 FALSIFIED (r=+0.068, anti-meristematic), F-PLB3 STRONGLY SUPPORTED (70.8% mycorrhizal fraction). Dual Growth Theorem: resource-constrained specialize, information-constrained diversify. External-value artifact produced (docs/SWARM-PLANT-LATTICE.md).
diff: Expected 3+ structures: got exactly 3. Expected >=1 empirical test: got 2. F-PLB1 falsification was unexpected — predicted specialization, observed diversification. F-PLB3 mycorrhizal fraction 70.8% far exceeded 20-50% prediction. Dual Growth Theorem was emergent from F-PLB1 falsification.

dual_growth_theorem.claim: Resource-constrained systems specialize (plant lattice), information-constrained systems diversify (dual lattice)
